client_list_packet_t(3) Library Functions Manual client_list_packet_t(3)

NAME

client_list_packet_t - Client list packet structure.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/packet/packet.h>

Data Fields


uint32_t client_count
Number of clients in the list (0 to MAX_CLIENTS). client_info_packet_t clients [32]
Array of client information structures.

Detailed Description

Client list packet structure.

Contains list of all connected clients with their information. Broadcast by server to all clients when client list changes.

Definition at line 690 of file packet.h.

Field Documentation

uint32_t client_list_packet_t::client_count

Number of clients in the list (0 to MAX_CLIENTS).

Definition at line 692 of file packet.h.

client_info_packet_t client_list_packet_t::clients[32]

Array of client information structures.

Definition at line 694 of file packet.h.
